---
title: "Questions on the Catechism. Reprinted from The Monthly Paper of Sunday Teaching."
---

## Questions on the Catechism. Reprinted from The Monthly Paper of Sunday Teaching.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1869
**Genre:** theology
**Format:** book

**Publisher:** London: J. and C. Mozley

### Notes

CMY refers to this among her own works in a letter to Macmillan, so although the book is anonymous, and not listed by Coleridge, the attribution seems safe.  It is listed, undated, by Battiscombe and Laski as owned by a member of the CMY Society.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
